name: Iceberg Tomato Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the tomatoes and set aside.
2. Add lime juice to water in a large pot. Stir until dissolved.
3. Strain the mixture before adding the sliced tomatoes.
4. Let the tomatoes soak for 24 hours.
5. Drain the tomatoes and soak them again in fresh cold water, changing the water every hour for 4 hours.
6. In a separate bowl, mix together all other ingredients (sugar, ginger, cinnamon) until well combined.
7. Bring this mixture to a boil.
8. Pour the hot mixture over the drained tomatoes and let stand overnight.
9. The next morning, pack the tomatoes into sterilized jars.
10. Boil the vinegar mixture for 1 hour before pouring it over the tomatoes in the jars.
11. Seal the jars tightly.
Makes 10 pints.
